title: QUIC Connection Runtime Endpoint Ingress Work Item
summary: Keep the endpoint-side receive classifier, route/token registries, and explicit effect handoff traceable while the ingress seam lands.
planned_changes:
- Add the fixed ingress pipeline that classifies version negotiation, retry, route hits, and stateless-reset eligibility in a stable order.
- Keep the destination-CID and reset-token registries endpoint-owned and concurrent.
- Apply binding updates and retirement through explicit effects so the connection runtime never mutates shared ingress state directly.
- Bound stateless-reset emission per remote address to prevent loops and oracle behavior.
- Add requirement-home tests for routed delivery, unroutable datagrams, reset scoping, emission limiting, and cleanup after discard.
verification_plan: Run the endpoint ingress requirement-home tests and the narrow `dotnet build`/`dotnet test` subset covering the new CRT ingress files.
completion_notes: Optional implementation notes, deviations, or follow-up items.
out_of_scope: Migration policy and any future connection-lifecycle work that is not needed to classify or route inbound datagrams.
